name: The Earth's Gift
text: You may discard a Treasure to gain a card costing up to (4).

name: The Field's Gift
text: +1 Action +(1) (Keep this until Cleanup.)

name: The Flame's Gift
text: You may trash a card from your hand.

name: The Forest's Gift
text: +1 Buy +(1) (Keep this until Cleanup.)

name: The Moon's Gift
text: Look through your discard pile. You may put a card from it onto your deck.

name: The Mountain's Gift
text: Gain a Silver.

name: The River's Gift
text: +1 Card at the end of this turn. (Keep this until Cleanup.)

name: The Sea's Gift
text: +1 Card

name: The Sky's Gift
text: You may discard 3 cards to gain a Gold.

name: The Sun's Gift
text: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Discard any number of them and put the rest back in any order.

name: The Swamp's Gift
text: Gain a WilloWisp.

name: The Wind's Gift
text: +2 Cards Discard 2 cards.

name: Emporium
text: +1 Card +1 Action +(1) | When you gain this, if you have at least 5 Action cards in play, +{2}.

name: Goons
text: +1 Buy +(2) Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand. | While you have this in play, when you buy a card, +{1}.

name: Wild Hunt
text: Choose one: +3 Cards and add {1} to the Wild Hunt pile; or gain an Estate, and if you do, take the from the pile.

name: Page
text: +1 Card +1 Action | When you discard this from play, you may exchange it for a Treasure Hunter.

name: Knights
text: Shuffle the Knights pile before each game with the Knights. Keep it face down except for the top card, which is the only one that can be bought or gained.

name: Ruined Library
text: +1 Card

name: Ruined Market
text: +1 Buy

name: Ruined Village
text: +1 Action

name: Survivors
text: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Discard them or put them back in any order.

name: Castles
text: Sort the Castle pile cost, putting the more expensive Castles on the bottom. For a 2player game, use only one of each Castle. Only the top card of the pile can be gained or bought.

name: Opulent Castle
text: Discard any number of Victory cards, revealed. +(2) per card discarded. | {3}

name: Fool
text: If you arent the player with Lost in the Woods: take it, take 3 Boons, and receive the Boons in any order. Heirloom: Lucky Coin

name: Flag Bearer
text: +(2) | When you gain or trash this, take the Flag.

name: Delusion
text: If you dont have Deluded or Envious, take Deluded.

name: Deluded
text: At the start of your Buy phase, return this, and you cant buy Actions this turn.

name: Bad Omens
text: Put your deck into your discard pile. Look through it and put 2 Coppers from it onto your deck (or reveal you cant).

name: Envy
text: If you dont have Deluded or Envious, take Envious.

name: Famine
text: Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Discard the Actions. Shuffle the rest into your deck.

name: Fear
text: If you have at least 5 cards in hand, discard an Action or Treasure (or reveal you cant).

name: Greed
text: Gain a Copper onto your deck.

name: Haunting
text: If you have at least 4 cards in hand, put one of them onto your deck.

name: Locusts
text: Trash the top card of your deck. If its Copper or Estate, gain a Curse. Otherwise, gain a cheaper card that shares a type with it.

name: Misery
text: If this is your first Misery this game, take Miserable. Otherwise, flip it over to Twice Miserable.

name: Plague
text: Gain a Curse to your hand.

name: Poverty
text: Discard down to 3 cards in hand.

name: War
text: Reveal cards from your deck until revealing one costing (3) or (4). Trash it and discard the rest.

name: Bat
text: Trash up to 2 cards from your hand. If you trashed at least one, exchange this for a Vampire. (This is not in the Supply.)
